title: NEpicloob NeonSword
description: Adjusted the swing trails in EpicFight to make it shine
body:
# NEpicloob NeonSword

**Enhance your combat visuals!** This mod modifies **Epic Fight's** swing trails to give them a vibrant, glowing neon effect.

### ✨ Features
* **Glowing Trails:** Adds a neon glow effect to weapon swing trails.
* **Customizable:** Includes in-game configuration settings to adjust the brightness of the blade effect to your liking.

### 💡 Shader Compatibility
This mod is fully compatible with shaders!
* **Troubleshooting:** If you notice incorrect trail colors (e.g., white trails appearing yellowish), please adjust your shader's **Block Lighting Color** (or *Block Lighting Temperature*) setting.
* *Note: Certain brightness settings only apply when shaders are enabled.*

### ⚠️ Compatibility Notes
* **Supported Version:** Minecraft 1.20.1
* **Optifine:** ❌ Not Compatible (Please use Oculus/Iris instead)

### CREDITS
Inspired by *EpicFight Sword Light Modifications*.
